summary: The enzyme glycogen phosphorlyase needs pyridoxal-5-phosphate (PLP), which comes from vitamin B6; thus, this vitamin supports proper functioning by acting through PLP. Key here involves identifying that only specific vitamins can activate enzymes like these ones involved directly with metabolic pathways such as carbohydrate metabolism where glycolysis plays crucial
